data.title: SMDO 2026 economic development conference launched in Atlanta with theme "The Future in Motion", featuring world-class speakers.
data.description: Announced in Atlanta on January 13, 2026, The Collaborative Firm launched the South Metro Development Outlook Conference, the largest economic development conference in the Southeast region. This conference serves as a catalyst for creating jobs, fostering growth, promoting technology advancements, and increasing global business opportunities. The event is expected to attract a significant number of attendees and participants from various industries, contributing to the overall economic development of the region.

data.title: Inventor creates gadget to speed up repacking of rope bags for fire & rescue services. 100s of feet of rope can now be handled more efficiently.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 13, 2026, an inventor from Burlington Township, New Jersey shared a new innovation aimed at improving efficiency in fire and rescue services. The inventor, also a fire captain, addressed the challenge of reloading hundreds of feet of rope into bags, a time-consuming task. Seeking a solution to streamline this process, the inventor developed a method to repack rope bags more efficiently.

data.title: Textio appoints Colleen Gallagher as new CEO, while Jensen Harris returns as CTO after a two-year stint as CEO.
data.description: In San Francisco, Textio, a company specializing in tools for recruitment and team coaching for high-growth firms, has disclosed the promotion of Colleen Gallagher, the current COO, to the position of CEO. Jensen Harris, who served as the founding CTO and CEO for two years, will shift back to the CTO role to oversee technical aspects while staying on the board. This change in leadership marks an important transition within the company.

data.title: Sydney Huang introduces Human API for integrating human capabilities into AI systems, improving efficiency.
data.description: In San Francisco, Sydney Huang, the founder and CEO of Eclipse Labs, revealed the introduction of Human API. This platform is agent-native and designed to assist AI systems that demand human participation to finalize real-world assignments and collect precise data. The rise of autonomous AI agents in business and research settings has shown limitations due to real-world obstacles. Numerous tasks that are economically beneficial rely on human input for successful completion.

data.title: Dividend Growth Split Corp. renews its equity program for distributing shares directly to the market.
data.description: In a recent report, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has significantly decreased to 4.5%. This is a notable improvement from the previous rate of 5.2%. The number of new jobs created has also seen a significant increase, with a total of 250,000 jobs added in the last quarter alone. This positive trend in the job market has been attributed to various government initiatives aimed at boosting economic growth and creating more employment opportunities.Experts predict that if this trend continues, the country's economy will see further improvements in the coming months.

data.title: Life & Banc Split Corp. renews its equity program, allowing it to sell up to 2 million shares directly in the market.
data.description: In a recent report, it was highlighted that the budget deficit for the current fiscal year is projected to reach a record high of $3.1 trillion, due to increased government spending in response to the ongoing pandemic. This deficit is more than triple the shortfall from the previous year. The report also revealed that the national debt has surpassed $27 trillion for the first time in history. Economists are expressing concerns about the long-term implications of such significant levels of deficit and debt on the country's economic stability. The government is facing mounting pressure to find ways to address this escalating financial crisis.

data.title: Adimab sees double-digit clinical program growth, with 11 new programs in 2025 and 89 total programs initiated to date.
data.description: In 2025, Adimab, LLC announced the launch of 11 new clinical programs, while 6 partner programs have successfully entered the market. The company has initiated a total of 89 clinical programs to date. Based in Lebanon, N.H., the company specializes in the discovery and engineering of fully human monoclonal and multispecific molecules. The recent developments signify a significant advancement in Adimab's contribution to the medical field.

data.title: Hyundai to compete in IMSA Racing 2026 with a strong lineup, including 4 Elantra N TCR entries and returning champions.
data.description: Hyundai Motor America recently announced the 2026 driver lineup for the IMSA Michelin Pilot Challenge. Bryan Herta Autosport will have four Elantra N TCR entries, while Rockwell Autosport Development will return with a fifth car. The roster includes a combination of returning champions and talented international drivers, making it a formidable team.

data.title: "Jeff Civillco's comedy special available to rent/purchase on Amazon Prime Video, Apple TV, Google Play, and YouTube TV. LA, Jan. 13, 2026."
data.description: A lively and uplifting comedy special is currently accessible for rent or purchase on various platforms including Amazon Prime Video, Apple TV, Google Play, and YouTube TV. Interested viewers can find an embeddable trailer link and download photos and posters for the show. This announcement was made in Los Angeles on January 13, 2026 via PRNewswire. Comedy enthusiasts can enjoy the high-energy performance that promises a feel-good experience for all.
Yoon's first trial to be held on February 19th

data.title: Virtual power plants using distributed energy resources can strengthen US electric system. -PRNewswire, Jan. 13, 2026.
data.description: The integration of solar panels, battery storage systems, and other decentralized energy resources has the potential to enhance the resilience of the United States' electricity grid. According to a report released on January 13, 2026, by The Pew Charitable Trusts' energy modernization project, Maureen Quinlan, a senior manager, and Leah Ford, a senior associate, emphasized the significance of these technologies. Their research suggests that harnessing these alternative energy sources could lead to a more robust electric system. This innovative approach aims to address the challenges faced by the U.S. energy sector and pave the way for a sustainable and reliable power grid.

data.title: Keynote speaker Mike Abrashoff announced for 2026 Responsible Care® & Sustainability Conference & Expo by American Chemistry Council.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, the American Chemistry Council (ACC) revealed that the keynote address at the 2026 Responsible Care® & Sustainability Conference & Expo in April will be delivered by Mike Abrashoff, a former U.S. Navy Commander and renowned leadership expert. This conference is expected to gather a significant number of participants from the chemical industry to discuss important topics related to sustainability and responsible care practices.

data.title: Polygon acquires Coinme and Sequence in $250M deal to strengthen stablecoin payments network for onchain transactions. CEO Boiron confirms.
data.description: During an interview with Cointelegraph, Marc Boiron, CEO of Polygon Labs, stated that the recent acquisitions were aimed at establishing the network as a compliant payments platform designed to facilitate the seamless transfer of stablecoins on the blockchain on a large scale.

data.title: U.S. FDA grants Breakthrough Therapy Designation to Ipsen's IPN60340 for first line unfit Acute Myeloid Leukemia, targeting BTN3A.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, Ipsen announced that the U.S. FDA granted Breakthrough Therapy Designation (BTD) for IPN60340, in conjunction with venetoclax and azacitidine (Ven-Aza), for first-line unfit acute myeloid leukemia, a severe blood cancer that commonly affects older adults. IPN60340 is a novel monoclonal antibody targeting BTN3A, a crucial immune-regulatory molecule found extensively in cancer cells. The BTD is aimed at accelerating the development and evaluation of drugs for severe or life-threatening conditions showing significant clinical enhancements. In July 2025, IPN60340 had received Orphan Drug Designations from both the U.S. FDA and the European Medicines Agency.

data.title: Firstsource Solutions Limited acquires TeleMedik, Puerto Rico-based tech solutions company, enhancing clinical capabilities.
data.description: Firstsource Solutions Limited, a prominent global provider of business management services and an RP-Sanjiv Goenka Group company, has disclosed its acquisition of TeleMedik, a Puerto Rico based company recognized for pioneering technological solutions. This strategic move aims to enhance Firstsource's clinical and utilization management services, as well as broaden its reach within the payer-provider network. The announcement comes as Firstsource's stock is listed on the National Stock Exchange (NSE:FSL) and Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE:532809).

data.title: Oyster names new CEO, Hadi Moussa, to drive global employment growth. Founder Tony Jamous becomes Executive Chairman.
data.description: In San Francisco, Oyster®, a remote-first company that provides global employment solutions for distributed teams, has named Hadi Moussa as the new Chief Executive Officer. Hadi Moussa will be taking over from founder and current CEO Tony Jamous, who will transition into the position of Executive Chairman, concentrating on long-term vision and strategy for the company. This shift in leadership is aimed at propelling Oyster's growth and advancing its goal of promoting equality in global employment. This strategic move is expected to bolster the company's operations as it continues to expand its reach.
